title: Vocational School of Health Services
content:
Vocational School of Health Services

Operating Room Services

MENU

This program aims to train experienced surgery health staff that are be able to prepare and help to access any kinds of surgical material in operations and may also provide assistance to their surgical team in all kinds of operations.

The students who graduate from the operating room services department may work as operating technicians in any operating room in public or private sector health institutions and organizations.

Period of Education:

2 years

Prep School:

Optional

Hospital Practice:

Yes

Hospital internship:

Yes

Education Language:

Turkish

Curriculum
